title: neolepisorus ensatus
intro: Neolepisorus ensatus, also known as the Ensate Cliff Brake, is a type of fern native to subtropical and tropical regions in Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to alleviate pain and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Neolepisorus ensatus include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, lower blood pressure, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits and proper usage.
